AboutPage.describeSchool: RS School is a free educational program with a practical focus. The course covers modern approaches to React development including hooks, TypeScript, testing, and performance optimization.
AboutPage.skillAuthor: Frontend developer with experience in creating modern web applications on React.
AboutPage.describeAuthor: Aspiring React developer with foundational knowledge of JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Gained experience through personal projects and online courses. Eager to develop skills in web application development and learn new technologies. Confident in my ability work in a team and quickly adapt to new tools.
